title: Certificate Management with kubeadm — External CA mode
text:
It is also possible to provide only the
ca.crt
file and not the
ca.key
file (this is only available for the root CA file, not other cert pairs).
If all other certificates and kubeconfig files are in place, kubeadm recognizes
this condition and activates the "External CA" mode. kubeadm will proceed without the
CA key on disk.
Instead, run the controller-manager standalone with
--controllers=csrsigner
and
point to the CA certificate and key.
There are various ways to prepare the component credentials when using external CA mode.
